summary: Some travelers who have spent time in Mexico have been infected with multidrug-resistant (MDR) Salmonella Newport.

source: CDC Travel Health Notices
title: Level 1 - Rabies in Morocco
summary: A case of rabies has been reported in a traveler from Morocco. Travelers potentially exposed to rabies in Morocco should immediately seek medical care. Upon returning home, travelers should follow up with their health care provider as soon as possible.

source: CDC Travel Health Notices
title: Level 1 - Andes Virus (Hantavirus) in South America

source: CDC Travel Health Notices
